rule_metadata.name: APT_Nazar_Svchost_Commands
rule_metadata.description: Detects Nazar's svchost based on supported commands
rule_metadata.author: Itay Cohen

rule_metadata.name: APT_Nazar_Component_Guids
rule_metadata.description: Detects Nazar Components by COM Objects' GUID
rule_metadata.author: Itay Cohen

rules.rule_text:
